component.name: PiLauncher
component.summary: 专为手柄设计的 Minecraft 启动器

description.p: PiLauncher 是一款为游戏手柄和掌机量身定制的 Minecraft 启动器。它拥有为主机式体验优化的全屏用户界面，让你可以轻松地使用手柄管理、配置和运行你的 Minecraft 游戏实例。

PiLauncher is a Minecraft launcher tailored for gamepads and handheld consoles. It features a full-screen, console-like user interface optimized for controller inputs, allowing you to easily manage and launch your Minecraft instances.

ul.li: 完全支持手柄操作，提供沉浸式大屏体验。
Full gamepad support for an immersive large-screen experience.
自动识别和配置手柄相关模组。
Automatic detection and configuration of gamepad-related mods.
极简且现代化的实例和模组管理。
Minimalist and modern instance and mod management.
[新功能] 实现基于 CAS 的 Mod 快照与回滚系统，支持查看详细的文件变更差异。
[新功能] 新增服务器绑定功能，支持在实例详情中关联特定服务器并设置自动加入。
[新功能] 新增「联机中心」页面，整合社区服务器目录与认证直连入口。
[优化] 深度优化第三方实例导入兼容性，修复了多级版本继承链的加载逻辑。
[优化] 重构实例详情面板，将基础信息、自定义链接及维护操作等模块化解耦。
[优化] 增强全局焦点捕获与导航记忆机制，大幅提升手柄操作的交互连贯性。
[New] Implemented CAS-based Mod Snapshot and Rollback system with detailed file diffing.
[New] Added Server Binding feature, allowing instances to be linked to specific servers with auto-join support.
[New] Introduced Multiplayer hub for community server discovery and direct connections.
[Optimization] Improved compatibility for third-party instance imports with recursive version loading.
[Optimization] Refactored Instance Detail panel into modular components for better maintainability.
[Optimization] Enhanced global focus management and navigation persistence for a smoother gamepad experience.
